main_event: Single object appearing as three white objects through theodolite observed moving east over Nebraska missile site area, disappearing to east, no sound.
sighted_object: Object twice the size of a pinhead; when seen through theodolite became three white objects grouped together; on successive passes became six red, green, and white lights
witness_description: Three airmen of a Geodetic Survey Team observing with theodolite (equivalent to a 40 power telescope)
interesting_points: Object appeared in middle of Big Dipper and moved on course as indicated
Through theodolite: single object became three white objects grouped together
On successive observations two rear whites disappeared; object became six red, green, and white lights
Objects disappeared in the East; no sound
Same night as multiple other sightings from Nebraska/Wyoming missile sites; all attributed to aircraft
